subcodes.first_line: And prayers and peace be upon Him after Whom there shall be no Prophet, O Muhammad, upon thee be the peace of God, the One, the Single [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و الصلوه و السلام علی من لا نبی بعده یا محمد علیک سلام الله الواحد الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
